prompt_text:
### Demographics: 80-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 21 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool); Recurrent nocturnal hypoglycemia (2-4 episodes/month, self-resolved) over the last 3 months.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Alzheimer's Disease
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~30 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 18units once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 70.9 kg; Height 170.1 cm; BMI 24.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 126/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.6%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 7.0%), FPG (12 months ago 306mg/dL; 9 months ago 257mg/dL; 6 months ago 226mg/dL; 3 months ago 235mg/dL; current 149mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 69.3kg; 9 months ago 66.7kg; 6 months ago 66.9kg; 3 months ago 65.7kg; current 70.9kg), Height (12 months ago 170.1cm; 9 months ago 170.1cm; 6 months ago 170.1cm; 3 months ago 170.1cm; current 170.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 24.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 126mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 71mmHg; 3 months ago 73mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 24U/L; 3 months ago 26U/L; current 22U/L), AST (12 months ago 21U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 13U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 18U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 48mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 47mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; current 48mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 414mg/g; 9 months ago 463mg/g; 6 months ago 361mg/g; 3 months ago 385mg/g; current 270mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 80mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 50mg/dL; 6 months ago 47mg/dL; 3 months ago 46mg/dL; current 48mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 108mg/dL; 9 months ago 108mg/dL; 6 months ago 110mg/dL; 3 months ago 108mg/dL; current 115mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.2g/dL; 3 months ago 13.9g/dL; current 13.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.77 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
